Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to occur after SW-Reviewer Agreed in the peer review process
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision when preceded by SW-Reviewer Agreed versus when preceded by SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time elapsed from SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that lead to SW-EIC Accept compared to those leading to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total waiting time to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision after the last SW-Reviewer Agreed event in each case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases where at least one SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in high-efficiency review variants (e.g., frequency ≥ 3)
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time from the final SW-Reviewer Agreed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in multi-round revision cases (e.g., involving RW-Initial Reviewer Selection)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Duration of SW-Awaiting EIC Decision phase in cases that include Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist versus those that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Immediate Reject Decision from the Checklist' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Awaiting EIC Decision to be reached after the first occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed in complex reviewer assignment scenarios
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time from Manuscript Export Succeeded to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in traces containing SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Minimum time from Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision when SW-Reviewer Agreed is present
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Time between SW-Reviewer Agreed and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in variants that include Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs within 7 days of reviewer assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'
